user.title: Set up Reolink ISP
user.description: Connect directly to a Reolink camera and expose lean ISP controls for exposure, shutter and gain.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the camera

init.title: Reolink ISP options
init.description: Adjust integration behavior for this camera.

apply_settings.name: Apply settings
apply_settings.description: Apply multiple ISP settings to one camera in a single write.

exposure.name: Exposure
exposure.description: Optional exposure mode to apply before validating gain and shutter fields.

shutter_min.name: Shutter Min
shutter_min.description: Optional shutter minimum. Valid when exposure is Manual or Anti-Smearing.

shutter_max.name: Shutter Max
shutter_max.description: Optional shutter maximum. Valid when exposure is Manual or Anti-Smearing.

gain_min.name: Gain Min
gain_min.description: Optional gain minimum. Valid when exposure is Manual.

gain_max.name: Gain Max
gain_max.description: Optional gain maximum. Valid when exposure is Manual.

save_profile.name: Save profile
save_profile.description: Save the camera's current Reolink ISP settings into one of the named profile slots.

profile.name: Profile
profile.description: Choose which saved profile slot to overwrite: day, gloomy, or night.

apply_profile.name: Apply profile
apply_profile.description: Apply a previously saved Reolink ISP profile to the camera in one write.

profile.name: Profile
profile.description: Choose which saved profile slot to apply: day, gloomy, or night.
